name: omue
description: OMUE — Oh My UE: Unreal Engine 开发控制台与 AI 协作工作台

scripts.build: npm run build:shared && npm run build:desktop
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck:shared && npm run typecheck:desktop
scripts.test:agent-ui: npm run build:shared && npm -w @omue/desktop run test:agent-ui
scripts.clean: npm -w @omue/desktop run clean && npm -w @omue/shared-protocol run clean
